Top 20 Fitness Influencers in 2026

Fitness influencers in 2026 are shaping how people train, eat, and stay motivated worldwide. Meet 20 creators leading fitness trends with workouts, wellness tips, and lifestyle content.

January 16, 2026
Josie Renna
Josie Renna

Josie Renna is a content strategy expert with a passion for helping creators navigate the ever-evolving digital landscape. Specializing in effective content creation techniques and platform-specific strategies, Josie provides insights to empower creators and brands to thrive online. With a deep understanding of algorithm dynamics and audience engagement, Josie shares actionable tips for optimizing content performance across various platforms.

Check Brand Deals
Example H2
Example H3

‍All real-time rankings of all platforms and countries are available here.

‍

‍

Here’s the list of the Top 20 Fitness Influencers in 2026:

‍

20. Ronnie Coleman 🇺🇸

Ronnie Coleman is an 8-time Mr. Olympia and a prominent figure in bodybuilding. He shares motivational content, workout routines, and personal experiences related to fitness and recovery from surgeries. His social media presence includes promoting his supplement brand, Ronnie Coleman Signature Series, and engaging with fans through motivational videos and personal updates. Coleman emphasizes the importance of confidence and perseverance in achieving fitness goals, often using the catchphrase 'Yeah Buddy!'

Favikon Authority Score: 9 385 pts

View the AI-Powered Profile

‍

‍

19. Thais Carla 🇧🇷

Thais Carla is a Brazilian dancer, choreographer, singer, and digital influencer known for her activism against obesity stigma and promoting body positivity. She shares fashion content, particularly focusing on plus-size styles, and collaborates with brands like Modaliss. Her social media presence emphasizes self-acceptance, empowerment, and inclusivity in fashion. Thais is also recognized for her music, including the track 'Não Pode Opinar,' which addresses body image issues.

Favikon Authority Score: 9 393 pts

View the AI-Powered Profile

‍

‍

18. Sara Saffari 🇺🇸

Sara Saffari is a fitness and lifestyle content creator known for her engaging posts on Instagram and YouTube. She promotes Gymshark and Raw Nutrition products, often sharing workout routines, fashion, and personal anecdotes. Her content features a mix of humor and relatable moments, appealing to a young audience interested in fitness and lifestyle. Sara actively engages with her followers through interactive posts and live streams, showcasing her vibrant personality and fitness journey.

Favikon Authority Score: 9 408 pts

View the AI-Powered Profile

‍

‍

17. John Cena 🇺🇸

John Cena is a multifaceted entertainer known for his work in professional wrestling, acting, and philanthropy. His social media presence features motivational messages, reflections on personal growth, and interactions with fans. He often promotes positivity and resilience, encouraging followers to rise above hate and embrace empathy. Cena's posts include insights into his personal life, collaborations with other celebrities, and promotional content for various brands, showcasing his diverse interests and connections in the entertainment industry.

Favikon Authority Score: 9 416 pts

View the AI-Powered Profile

‍

‍

16. Darryl Williams 🇺🇸

Darryl Williams, known as Bullyjuice, is a fitness enthusiast and veteran who shares workout routines, motivational content, and personal insights on social media. His platforms include YouTube, Instagram, and TikTok, where he emphasizes family values, fitness, and self-improvement. He hosts a podcast, 'Out of Love,' focusing on relationships and personal growth. His content often features home workouts, fitness tips, and lifestyle vlogs, appealing to a diverse audience interested in health and wellness.

Favikon Authority Score: 9 420 pts

View the AI-Powered Profile

‍

‍

15. Leo Skepi 🇦🇱

Leo Skepi is a 27-year-old podcast host from Albania, known for his show 'Aware & Aggravated.' His content focuses on personal growth, relationships, and navigating life's challenges with humor and honesty. He engages his audience through storytelling and sharp insights, encouraging self-reflection and emotional resilience. Leo promotes his merchandise and app, Positive Focus, while actively interacting with his followers across platforms like TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube.

Favikon Authority Score: 9 428 pts

View the AI-Powered Profile

‍

‍

14. Maíra Cardi 🇧🇷

Maíra Cardi is a Brazilian health coach, weight-loss entrepreneur, and creator of Seca Você. She shares nutrition guidance, mindset strategies, and transformative wellness coaching to help women achieve sustainable health. With a strong presence on YouTube and TikTok, her content covers weight loss, pregnancy wellness, family life, and home renovation as part of a holistic lifestyle brand.

Favikon Authority Score: 9 464 pts

View the AI-Powered Profile

‍

‍

13. Browney 🇳🇱

Browney is a fitness content creator focused on workout challenges, transformations, and health tips. He promotes his 90-Day Challenge app and collaborates with brands like Gymshark and MyProtein. His content often features personal stories of fitness journeys, including helping others achieve their goals. He engages with a large audience through motivational posts and interactive challenges, emphasizing physical fitness and healthy living.

Favikon Authority Score: 9 469 pts

View the AI-Powered Profile

‍

‍

12. Noel Deyzel 🇿🇦

Noel Deyzel is a fitness expert and entrepreneur with over 17 years of experience in bodybuilding. He shares fitness and mental health advice through engaging content across platforms like TikTok and YouTube. His posts often include workout tips, meal prep recipes, and motivational messages aimed at inspiring his audience to achieve their fitness goals. He is also the owner of RYSE Supplements and promotes a healthy lifestyle through his coaching services.

Favikon Authority Score: 9 470 pts

View the AI-Powered Profile

‍

‍

11. Toguro 🇧🇷

Toguro is a Brazilian entrepreneur and influencer known for his expertise in modern philosophy and fitness. He shares content related to physical training, lifestyle, and personal development across multiple platforms, including Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube. His posts often reflect a blend of humor and motivational themes, engaging a wide audience with relatable content. Toguro also promotes his business ventures and collaborations, showcasing a strong presence in the influencer marketing space.

Favikon Authority Score: 9 480 pts

View the AI-Powered Profile

‍

‍

10. Arnold Schwarzenegger  🇺🇸

Arnold Schwarzenegger is a multifaceted personality known for his achievements as a bodybuilder, actor, and former Governor of California. He promotes fitness and wellness through his daily newsletter, 'Arnold's Pump Club,' and engages his audience with motivational content. His social media presence emphasizes community support, personal development, and giving back, often sharing insights from his life experiences. He also addresses social issues and encourages a positive lifestyle through fitness.

Favikon Authority Score: 9 500 pts

View the AI-Powered Profile

‍

‍

9. Marvin Achi 🇿🇦

Marvin Achi is a fitness trainer and chemical engineer known for his appearances on America's Got Talent and Netflix's The Circle. He focuses on helping individuals achieve weight loss goals through his 'Lose 15-20 lbs and Get Lean' program. His social media presence emphasizes personal growth, fitness tips, and motivational content, often integrating his faith and purpose-driven messages. Achi engages with a large audience through various platforms, sharing insights into his life as an online fitness coach.

Favikon Authority Score: 9 515 pts

View the AI-Powered Profile

‍

‍

8. Ankit Baiyanpuria 🇮🇳

Ankit Baiyanpuria is a fitness enthusiast and wrestler from Sonipat, India, known for promoting health and wellness through his social media platforms. He shares motivational content, workout routines, and personal experiences related to fitness and wrestling. Ankit actively engages with his audience by encouraging them to pursue their fitness goals and maintain a healthy lifestyle. His posts often reflect a blend of cultural pride and fitness motivation, appealing to a broad audience interested in health and sports.

Favikon Authority Score: 9 518 pts

View the AI-Powered Profile

‍

‍

7. Jeff Nippard 🇨🇦

Jeff Nippard is a Canadian natural pro bodybuilder and an internationally qualified powerlifter with a BSc in biochemistry/chemistry. He shares science-based fitness content on YouTube, focusing on muscle building, nutrition, and training techniques. With a strong following of over 8 million on YouTube, he promotes his MacroFactor nutrition app and offers various training programs. His content is heavily research-driven, often featuring collaborations with other fitness experts.

Favikon Authority Score: 9 581 pts

View the AI-Powered Profile

‍

‍

6. Gero Arias 🇦🇷

Gero Arias is a prominent social media personality from San Luis, Argentina, known for his engaging and adventurous content. He frequently shares videos of his climbing and fitness challenges, capturing the attention of millions with his daring feats and personal milestones. Gero's content often revolves around physical challenges and personal growth, resonating with a wide audience. His presence on platforms like TikTok and Instagram highlights his commitment to pushing boundaries and inspiring others.

Favikon Authority Score: 9 633 pts

View the AI-Powered Profile

‍

‍

5. Dhar Mann 🇺🇸

Dhar Mann is a prominent digital content creator known for his inspirational videos that often tackle social issues and personal growth. With over 120 million followers across various platforms, he has been recognized as the #1 digital scripted content creator globally. His work emphasizes themes of kindness, compassion, and resilience, often featuring narratives that resonate with audiences of all ages. Mann is also the CEO of Dhar Mann Studios, which produces a significant volume of media weekly, aiming to make a positive impact.

Favikon Authority Score: 9 643 pts

View the AI-Powered Profile

‍

‍

4. Ashton Hall 🇺🇸

Ashton Hall is a prominent online fitness coach and entrepreneur, dedicated to helping other trainers build and scale their online fitness businesses. With a strong emphasis on personal branding and business growth, Ashton offers meal plans, supplements, and 1:1 coaching. His content is deeply rooted in Christian faith, often sharing motivational insights and personal experiences. Ashton is committed to empowering coaches to achieve financial freedom and personal success through structured routines and strategic planning.

Favikon Authority Score: 9 695 pts

View the AI-Powered Profile

‍

‍

3. Pawan Sahu 🇮🇳

Pawan Sahu is a fitness model and content creator known for sharing workout tips, desi training routines, and his natural bodybuilding transformation journey. He emphasizes quality over quantity, hard work, and dedication, while staying active on TikTok and Instagram to connect with his fitness-focused audience. Beyond fitness, he is also a prominent YouTuber who creates lifestyle and automotive content, sharing personal experiences, adventures, and supplement-related collaborations through engaging storytelling.

Favikon Authority Score: 9 695 pts

View the AI-Powered Profile

‍

‍

2. Chris Bumstead 🇨🇦

Chris Bumstead is a renowned Canadian bodybuilder, celebrated for winning the Classic Physique Mr. Olympia title multiple times. He is the owner of several fitness-related brands, including Raw Nutrition and Bum Energy. His social media presence is centered around fitness, bodybuilding, and personal growth, often sharing insights into his training routines and motivational content. Chris is also known for his candid reflections on the challenges and rewards of his bodybuilding journey.

Favikon Authority Score: 9 733 pts

View the AI-Powered Profile

‍

‍

1. Anatoly 🇺🇦

Anatoly is an elite powerlifter and owner of Arriba Nutrition, known for his humorous and engaging gym-related pranks on social media. He shares content that combines fitness expertise with lighthearted pranks, often featuring gym equipment and unique training methods. Anatoly promotes his own merchandise and training programs, leveraging his strong social media presence to engage with a large audience. His content is characterized by a playful and witty style, appealing to fitness enthusiasts.

Favikon Authority Score: 9 822 pts

View the AI-Powered Profile
